subcodes.first_line: Glory to Thee, O my God! The first stirrings of the spring of Thy grace have appeared and clothed Thine earth with verdure.
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی قد ظهرت طلایع ربیع فضلک و اخضرت بها اراضی مملکتک و امطرت سحاب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
